change_title: Upgrade Redis cluster from 7.0 to 7.2 for session store
change_description: Upgrade the production Redis cluster (3 nodes) from Redis 7.0.15 to 7.2.4. This upgrade includes improved memory efficiency, new WAITAOF command support, and security patches for CVE-2024-31449. Rolling upgrade with zero-downtime approach.
business_justification: Security patches address a critical CVE. Memory optimization expected to reduce Redis costs by 15%. Required for upcoming real-time features in Q2 roadmap.
rollback_plan:
1. Stop rolling upgrade at current node
2. Revert completed nodes to 7.0.15 using blue-green swap
3. Verify cluster health with redis-cli cluster info
4. Estimated rollback: 15 minutes per node
test_evidence:
CI: https://ci.example.com/builds/redis-upgrade-7821
Staging validation: 72-hour soak test passed (Feb 12-15)
Load test: 150% peak traffic sustained for 2 hours on staging

approvers.name: Maria Santos
approvers.rationale: Staging soak test results are solid. Rolling upgrade approach minimizes risk.
